name: Whole Wheat Hamburger and Hot Dog Buns- 1 Pound
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread pan in the order listed.
2. Set the machine to dough setting.
3. When the dough is ready for hamburger buns, cut and shape into 7 pieces.
4. For hot dog buns, cut and shape into 8 pieces.
5. Grease a baking sheet. Roll each piece of dough into a ball and flatten for shaping.
6. Place the flattened pieces on the prepared baking sheet (lightly spray the sheet with Pam).
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place for approximately 1 hour.
8. Bake at 400°F for 12-15 minutes until golden brown.
9. Cool on racks.
